author: maxine--knowledge-edit
content: Plan: Add --replace-section and --append-to-section flags to knowledge edit command. Section parser splits body by markdown headings (^#{1,6} ), tracks heading levels. replace_section_content replaces everything between heading and next same-or-higher-level heading. append_to_section_content appends before next heading. Clap argument group enforces mutual exclusivity with --append. Both require --content.
